title: Video by between_the_posts_com
description:
#mobilitymonday is here!
This exercise is a stretching exercise and is very useful when you have the feeling that you get pushed out to the side when you are in the basic shin box position. This is a sign that you need probably a bit more training on the internal rotation. Full description of the exercise via link in bio.
